designConstraints: Must use 8px spacing unit grid system with scale values: 4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, 48, 64px
Background primary: deep-navy (#0F172A); surface cards: navy-surface (#1E293B); elevated elements: navy-raised (#293548)
Maximum 3 levels of visual hierarchy across the page layout
12-column grid with 24px gutters and 24px margins; content max-width 1280px
Primary viewport is 1440px wide (desktop-first); tablet breakpoint at 768px must be supported
Border radius tokens: small=6px for badges/chips, medium=10px for cards, large=16px for modals/popovers, pill=9999px for status badges
CTA primary color gold-amber (#F59E0B) with hover state #D97706; text on CTA uses deep-navy (#0F172A)
All interactive elements must meet minimum touch target of 44×44px
Elevation level 1 (0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)) for cards; level 2 (0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)) for ExpenseDetailPopover and CategoryFilterDropdown
Typography: DM Sans (display) for headings; DM Mono (body) for numeric/data values; heading-1 24px/700, heading-2 16px/600, body 14px/400, label 12px/500
Motion: normal duration 300ms with cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) for transitions; fast 150ms for hover states
Focus ring: 2px solid gold-amber (#F59E0B) with 2px offset on all interactive elements
Disabled state opacity: 0.38; overlay: rgba(0,0,0,0.65) for ExpenseDetailPopover backdrop
BudgetStatusBadge uses semantic colors: teal-success (#14B8A6) for on-track, gold-amber (#F59E0B) for heads-up, coral-error (#F87171) for over-budget
CategoryDonutChart segment colors must be sourced from Category.color_hex field; legend items align with chart segments
NavigationTabs must be sticky at bottom of viewport with z-index 1100
ExpenseDetailPopover renders at z-index 1000 (dropdown level); SettingsDialog renders at z-index 1200 (modal level)
RecentExpensesList is scrollable within its container; does not scroll the full page
CategoryFilterDropdown active state must visually indicate selected category using gold-amber border or background tint
shadcn/ui component library: Card for BudgetSummaryCard, Progress for ProgressBar, Badge for BudgetStatusBadge, Tabs for NavigationTabs
referencePatterns: Card-based data display pattern: BudgetSummaryCard and CategoryDonutChart use navy-surface cards with elevation level 1, medium border radius (10px), and 24px internal padding
Donut chart with centered summary stat and adjacent legend list pattern for CategoryDonutChart + CategoryLegend
Horizontal filter chip bar with active state indicator (gold-amber border) for CategoryFilterDropdown
Scrollable list with row-level tap targets for RecentExpensesList and ExpenseRow; each row minimum 44px height
Inline popover anchored to row for ExpenseDetailPopover with edit/delete action buttons and elevation level 2 shadow
Status badge pill pattern for BudgetStatusBadge with semantic color fill and deep-navy text
Progress bar with color-coded fill reflecting budget health state (teal/amber/coral) for ProgressBar
Top bar with month navigation arrows and centered month/year label for MonthSelector within TopBar
Empty state centered illustration with primary CTA button for EmptyState component
Bottom navigation tab bar with icon + label pairs and active tab highlighted in gold-amber for NavigationTabs
Reactive budget health indicator pattern: BudgetSummaryCard, ProgressBar, and BudgetStatusBadge update in sync when month changes or expense data changes
Settings accessible via icon button in TopBar triggering a drawer overlay (z-index 1200)
accessibilityRequirements: WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of 4.5:1 minimum for all text; silver-text (#CBD5E1) on deep-navy (#0F172A) achieves ~11:1; gold-amber (#F59E0B) on deep-navy achieves ~8.5:1
BudgetStatusBadge must not rely on color alone to convey status; include text label ('On Track', 'Heads Up', 'Over Budget') alongside color indicator
CategoryDonutChart must provide a text-based alternative (CategoryLegend with percentage values) for screen reader users; chart SVG must include role='img' and aria-label describing the chart summary
RecentExpensesList must be implemented as a semantic list (ul/li) with each ExpenseRow as a list item; aria-label on the list describing its content
ExpenseRow interactive elements must have descriptive aria-labels including merchant name and amount (e.g., 'Expense: Starbucks, $4.50, Food category, August 12')

ExpenseDetailPopover must trap focus when open, be dismissible via Escape key, and return focus to the triggering ExpenseRow on close; role='dialog' with aria-modal='true' and aria-labelledby pointing to popover title
CategoryFilterDropdown must be keyboard navigable with arrow keys; selected state communicated via aria-selected; dropdown list uses role='listbox' with role='option' items
MonthSelector previous/next navigation buttons must have aria-label='Previous month' and aria-label='Next month'; current month display has aria-live='polite' for reactive updates
ProgressBar must use role='progressbar' with aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin='0', aria-valuemax reflecting budget amount, and aria-label='Monthly budget progress'
NavigationTabs must use role='tablist' with role='tab' items; active tab indicated by aria-selected='true'; keyboard navigation via arrow keys between tabs
All icon-only buttons (settings, close, navigation arrows) must have aria-label text equivalents
EmptyState CTA button must have descriptive aria-label='Add your first expense'
SettingsDialog must use role='dialog' with aria-modal='true', focus trap, and Escape key dismissal
Reactive budget health updates must use aria-live='polite' region so screen readers announce status changes without interrupting user flow
Minimum touch target of 44×44px enforced on all interactive elements including ExpenseRow, filter chips, and navigation tabs
Focus ring: 2px solid gold-amber (#F59E0B) with 2px offset visible on all focusable elements in keyboard navigation mode
dataModelDependencies: Expense entity: id, amount, merchant, category_id, date, payment_method_id, note, currency — used by RecentExpensesList, ExpenseRow, ExpenseDetailPopover
Category entity: id, name, color_token, color_hex, icon, is_default, sort_order — used by CategoryDonutChart, CategoryLegend, CategoryFilterDropdown, ExpenseRow category label
Budget entity: id, month, year, amount, currency — used by BudgetSummaryCard, ProgressBar, BudgetStatusBadge for budget health calculation
PaymentMethod entity: id, name, type, icon, last_four, is_default — used by ExpenseDetailPopover to display payment method on expense detail
CategoryAggregate entity: category_id, month, year, total_amount, transaction_count, percentage — used by CategoryDonutChart and CategoryLegend for segment sizing
UserSettings entity: currency, default_monthly_budget, locale — used by BudgetSummaryCard and all currency display formatting across the dashboard
API endpoint get-expenses (GET /api/expenses): query params month, year, category_id, page, limit — drives RecentExpensesList with category filter and month navigation
API endpoint get-categories (GET /api/categories): drives CategoryFilterDropdown options and CategoryLegend labels
API endpoint get-budget (GET /api/budgets): query params month, year — drives BudgetSummaryCard amount and ProgressBar max value
API endpoint get-category-aggregates (GET /api/aggregates/categories): query params month, year — drives CategoryDonutChart segment data and CategoryLegend percentages
API endpoint get-user-settings (GET /api/settings): drives currency symbol and locale formatting across all monetary displays
